name: Goodpuffer
description:
Hyelo Cackies enjoy I guess version 1.0

Here are some stuff you should know about=

AEAEAE

Expression of anger, frustration or negative surprise. Sometimes also used as "ÆÆÆÆ".

Ano

No.

Yease

Yes.

Oke

Okay.

Cackie

Humans. Mostly used as a derogatory term by the fish to insult humans (Players).

Hyelo/Hyeloa

Hello. Greeting used mostly towards humans.

Oog/Ooging

Messing around/being silly.

Haaaaa

Heavily breathing.

Fuel egg is good, fuel egg is god

A prayer towards Fuel Egg.

Goody

Good. Expression of happiness.

Stuped

Stupid.

Update board: there is nothing yet no updates yet
